title: magnolia nutans
intro: Magnolia nutans, also known as the Southern Magnolia or Liriodendron tulipifera's southern counterpart, is a deciduous tree native to southeastern China. Its bark, roots, and leaves have been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries due to their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Magnolia nutans is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, and it can also be used to make a powder for capsule or tablet form.
